---
mode: "agent"
description: "Investigate and fix a bug in the Pulsecity stack"
---

# Fix a bug in Pulsecity

1. Read the repo guidance in .github/copilot-instructions.md and the relevant scoped instructions before changing code.
2. Reproduce the issue or inspect the failing test.
3. Trace the relevant backend or frontend code path and preserve the existing patterns.
4. Apply the smallest root-cause fix.
5. Verify the change with targeted tests or a local run.
